headline: M&T Bank Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Strong Q2 Results
summary: M&T Bank Corp (NYSE:MTB) reported higher earnings and sales in Q2, leading to a 2.8% stock price increase. Analysts raised price targets for MTB.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $250
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst David Konrad   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $242 to $250.
